title: Whisky Hunter Auction Data Point
description: Schema representing an aggregated auction data point from the Whisky Hunter API. Covers trading volume, bid statistics, and lot counts for a single auction platform at a specific date. All monetary values are in GBP (£).

dt.description: Date of the auction data point (YYYY-MM-DD).

auction_name.description: Name of the whisky auction platform.

auction_slug.description: URL-safe identifier for the auction platform.

auction_trading_volume.description: Total trading volume (sum of winning bids) in GBP (£). Excludes lots that did not meet reserve price.

auction_lots_count.description: Number of lots sold in this auction during this period.

all_auctions_lots_count.description: Total lots sold across all 28 tracked auctions in this period.

winning_bid_max.description: Maximum (highest) winning bid in this auction in GBP (£).

winning_bid_min.description: Minimum (lowest) winning bid in this auction in GBP (£).

winning_bid_mean.description: Mean (average) winning bid in this auction in GBP (£).
